meaning: n.四肢瘫痪者adj.四肢瘫痪的
examples: That same year, he had a surfing accident, which rendered him quadriplegic.
Walentin lived for another 18 months as a quadriplegic before finally succumbing to his wounds.
I had suffered a spinal cord injury-C4 C5 complete and was quadriplegic paralyzed from my shoulders down.
In 1977, at the age of 30, he became a quadriplegic after a fall.
That is, until one altercation with a fellow team mate left him a quadriplegic.
